activity.title: Auto-Bounty System Launched
activity.description: Deployed automated security research orchestrator — cron-driven task selection, Claude sessions, portfolio updates, circuit breakers. Runs 2x daily.

activity.title: IBM VDP: 2 Reports Submitted
activity.description: CRITICAL: Live MongoDB + Watson credentials via GitLab exposure. HIGH: Unauthenticated session CRUD on B2B Catalog API. Both submitted to HackerOne.

activity.title: Critical Review & Stress Testing
activity.description: Stress-tested all reports across JET, Capital.com, and Deriv. Cut 31 reports to 14 submission-worthy using 5-gate validation framework.

activity.title: Methodology Retrospective
activity.description: Analyzed 40 reports across 5 programs. 35% validation rate. Built 5-gate validation system, evidence tiers, enforcement agents, and 11 workflow skills.

activity.title: Superdrug: 5 Reports Submitted
activity.description: Submitted 5 reports to Intigriti — healthcare API exposure (HIGH), reCAPTCHA bypass (MED), UAT environment access (MED), and more. Awaiting triage.

activity.title: Bug Bounty Platform Onboarding
activity.description: Registered and verified on HackerOne, Bugcrowd, and Intigriti. Launched 5 simultaneous engagements: Meesho, Superdrug, Capital.com, Deriv, Just Eat Takeaway.

activity.title: Juice Shop Assessment Complete
activity.description: Comprehensive security assessment: 30+ findings across OWASP Top 10 categories. 26/110 challenges solved with full documentation.

activity.title: Meta Phishing Takedown Initiated
activity.description: Completed investigation of Meta Business Suite phishing campaign. MITRE ATT&CK mapped. Takedown reports submitted.

activity.title: VPS Security Hardening
activity.description: Completed comprehensive VPS hardening: SSH key-only auth, fail2ban, UFW, kernel parameters, unattended upgrades. Lynis audit clean.

activity.title: Portfolio Dashboard Deployed

activity.title: Security Research Lab Established
